## Summary

- **What does this PR change?**
  - Short bullets describing the main changes.
- **Why are these changes needed now?**

## Technical details

- **RoomTree / WFC changes (if any)**
  - e.g. new rules, weights, door logic, room shapes, corridor behavior.
- **DualGrid / canonical tiles changes (if any)**
  - e.g. key logic, transforms, BiomeTileSet/registry wiring, tile assets.
- **Other systems touched**
  - e.g. combat, UI, player controller, data schemas.

## Testing

- **Manual testing**
  - [ ] RoomTree demo scene runs without errors
  - [ ] Regular WFC demo scene runs without errors
  - [ ] DualGrid renders correctly (no obvious gaps or misaligned walls)
  - [ ] No regressions in core gameplay scenes
- **Automated tests**
  - [ ] All existing tests pass
  - [ ] New tests added for this change (if applicable)

Describe any specific test steps:

1. Scene(s) opened:
2. Buttons / menu items used:
3. Expected vs actual:

## Screenshots / GIFs (optional)

If this changes visuals (tiles, rooms, UI), include before/after images where helpful.

## Risks & roll-back plan

- **Potential side effects**
  - e.g. impacts on map generation density, performance, tile memory, save data.
- **How to roll back**
  - e.g. revert this PR, or toggle a feature flag / inspector option.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code builds and runs locally
- [ ] New/changed behavior is documented (markdown docs or comments where appropriate)
- [ ] Any new public APIs / assets are named consistently with the project style
- [ ] I’ve checked for leftover debug logs / temporary code
